title: Riso Print Studies
description: Four independent Risograph print studies exploring zine spreads, posters, flyers, and comics with physical ink defects.
creative_direction: Each square image is a self-contained photoreal print artifact using fluorescent pink, cobalt blue, and black separations, visible paper fibers, halftone grain, uneven coverage, and intentional 1-2mm registration errors.

en.title: Riso Print Studies
en.description: Four independent Risograph print studies exploring zine spreads, posters, flyers, and comics with physical ink defects.

zh-CN.title: Risograph 单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立 Risograph 印刷物研究，覆盖 zine 跨页、海报、传单和漫画，并突出真实油墨缺陷。
